title: Create: Radiation n' Zombies
description: A world infected by radiation and the undead, where only You and the Power of Create remains.
body:
A nuclear apocalypse happened, and most humans, villagers and civilizations either have fallen or turned into zombies by an infection. You are the only survivor, and you must survive though the harsh environment by using the power of machinery.

**Important: This modpack is EXTREMELY DIFFICULT.** It is recommended to play in survival, as hardcore mode is almost impossible to survive in.

## The modpack adds:
- Constant radiation, varies between biomes (From _Radiach_)
- Machinery (From _Create_ and its addons)
- Vehicle building (From _Valkyrien Skies_, _Trackwork_, _Clockwork_, _Drive-by-Wire_, and other mods)
- Intelligent and infectious zombies (From _Zombie Awareness_, _Contagion_, _Enhanced AI_, _Zombies Hate Light_ and _Zombies Reworked_)
- Guns (From _MrCrayfish's Gun Mod_)
- Cannons (From _Create Big Cannons_)
- Enhanced terrain and atmospyhere (From Terralith and the built-in resource pack of the modpack)
- And some other features aswell

## Tips
- It is recommended to use pre-defined seeds, because relying on random seeds can spawn you in insurvivable areas. (Like deserts, stony shores and badlands)
- Lush caves are a great spot for bases, because there is no radiation, and you can also grow trees in there. Horever, watch out for zombies!
- Avoid Basalt Deltas! They have the highest level of radiation, which is insurvivable even in Nano-suits.
- Put light sources above the ground, because zombies will destroy any torches, lanterns and other light blocks if they come across one.
- A wall is not enough, mobs can breach it. Keep them away from your base!
- Do not let zombies bite you! If you get bitten by a zombie, you get an infection that kills you in 10 minutes unless cured.
- Radiation levels vary across biomes, from Level 0 to 6. Biomes with higher radiation levels have a yellow-green atmospyhere and water color, high amounts of radioactive dust in the air, and more dead-looking vegetation aswell. If your suit can't resist that level, avoid that biome. ([Biome radiation values](https://modrinth.com/mod/radiach))
- If you have intense lag because of the particles, there is a no-particle version of the built-in resource pack, you can switch over to it
